basic_details.job_title: MSACS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Medical Officer, Pharmacist Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Maharashtra State AIDS Control Society Wadala (MSACS)
basic_details.short_information: Maharashtra State AIDS Control Society Wadala (MSACS) Notification 2026 has been released on 25-06-2026 on the official website msacs.org. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the MSACS Recruitment 2026 for Medical Officer and Pharmacist posts.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 62 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS, Bachelors Degree in Pharmacy or Diploma in Pharmacy
qualification.details: Medical Officer: MBBS (Preference to trained by NACO at one of the NACO designated training centers.) Pharmacist: Bachelors Degree in Pharmacy from a recognized institute OR Diploma in pharmacy. The candidate should be registered in state pharmacy council. 3 years of experience for Diploma holders. MSCIT/DOEACC- CCC

salary_details.details: Medical Officer: Rs. 72,000/- Per Month Pharmacist: Rs. 21,000/- Per Month

selection_process: Application Scrutiny Walk-in Interview Written Examination Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MSACS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: thane.nic.in/www.msacs.org.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

rows.maharashtra_state_aids_control_society_w: MBBS, Bachelors Degree in Pharmacy or Diploma in Pharmacy

content_sections.heading: MSACS Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the MSACS Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download MSACS Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: MSACS Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Medical Officer: MBBS (Preference to trained by NACO at one of the NACO designated training centers.) Pharmacist: Bachelors Degree in Pharmacy from a recognized institute OR Diploma in pharmacy. The candidate should be registered in state pharmacy council. 3 years of experience for Diploma holders. MSCIT/DOEACC- CCC

content_sections.heading: MSACS Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 62 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

content_sections.heading: MSACS Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Medical Officer: Rs. 72,000/- Per Month Pharmacist: Rs. 21,000/- Per Month

content_sections.heading: MSACS Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Application Scrutiny Walk-in Interview Written Examination Document Verification

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for MSACS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: thane.nic.in/www.msacs.org. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for MSACS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the application form for MSACS Recruitment 2026 is 10th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in MSACS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced for the Medical Officer and Pharmacist posts in the Maharashtra State AIDS Control Society Wadala Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: For the Medical Officer post, candidates must possess an MBBS degree. Preference will be given to those trained by NACO at designated training centers.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to MSACS posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts in this recruitment is 62 years. Specific age relaxation details are not provided in the current information.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Pharmacist position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Pharmacist position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 21,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for MSACS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the MSACS Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes Application Scrutiny, a Walk-in Interview, a Written Examination, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for MSACS Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for MSACS Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q9. When is the walk-in interview for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Medical Officer post is scheduled to be held on 20th July 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website, which is thane.nic.in/www.msacs.org. Links are provided in the Important Links section.
